verdicts.corrected_value: Open-source eCommerce plugin for WordPress providing REST APIs for store and admin (products, orders, customers, etc.).
verdicts.reasoning: The homepage confirms that WooCommerce is an open-source commerce platform for WordPress, aligning with the recorded description.
The URL for authentication methods leads to a dead page, preventing verification of the claimed authentication methods.
The URL for credential access leads to a dead page, preventing verification of the claimed self-serve free access to API keys.
The API documentation confirms that the REST API covers a broad range of store objects, supporting the recorded value.
While the buildability claim suggests that a developer can build with the API today, the lack of verifiable evidence from the dead URLs undermines this assertion.
